text.title: code-review-slo-and-rubric Worked Examples
text.summary: One full end-to-end example of code-review-slo-and-rubric applied to a representative input.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: orders squad (5 devs). Current p50 first-response: 14h; p95: 44h. AI pre-review approved (Claude).

example.code: { "artefact_id": "crs-orders-2026-05-23", "owner": "@ruslan", "first_response_business_hours": 18, "merge_business_hours": 36, "reviewer_open_pr_cap": 5, "rotation_algorithm": "round-robin", "blockers": [ "correctness regression on a test case", "security defect (injection, auth, secret leak)", "public-API breaking without versioned migration", "missing test for new behaviour" ], "nits": [ "naming preference", "formatting", "unrelated refactor request" ], "ai_pre_review_tool": "claude", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }
example.note: SLO sourced from last 30 days of PR data; 18h target = p50 + 28% buffer.
